Command line: `cc /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/tmp/tmpngyl26gl/testfile.c -E -P -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -P -O0 -U_FORTIFY_SOURCE -Werror=implicit-function-declaration -std=gnu99` -> 0
stdout:
#pragma clang diagnostic push
#pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wc23-extensions"
#pragma clang diagnostic pop
int android_get_application_target_sdk_version() __attribute__((__availability__(android,strict,introduced=24 )));
int __system_property_get(const char* _Nonnull __name, char* _Nonnull __value);
int atoi(const char* _Nonnull __s) __attribute__((__pure__));
static __inline__ int android_get_device_api_level() {
  char value[92] = { 0 };
  if (__system_property_get("ro.build.version.sdk", value) < 1) return -1;
  int api_level = atoi(value);
  return (api_level > 0) ? api_level : -1;
}

void __assert(const char* _Nonnull __file, int __line, const char* _Nonnull __msg) __attribute__((__noreturn__));
void __assert2(const char* _Nonnull __file, int __line, const char* _Nonnull __function, const char* _Nonnull __msg) __attribute__((__noreturn__));

            /* If it's not defined as a macro, try to use as a symbol */
            #ifndef versionsort
                versionsort;
            #endif

#pragma clang diagnostic push
#pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wc23-extensions"
#pragma clang diagnostic pop
int android_get_application_target_sdk_version() __attribute__((__availability__(android,strict,introduced=24 )));
int __system_property_get(const char* _Nonnull __name, char* _Nonnull __value);
int atoi(const char* _Nonnull __s) __attribute__((__pure__));
static __inline__ int android_get_device_api_level() {
  char value[92] = { 0 };
  if (__system_property_get("ro.build.version.sdk", value) < 1) return -1;
  int api_level = atoi(value);
  return (api_level > 0) ? api_level : -1;
}

"MESON_GET_DEFINE_DELIMITER_END"

        fail fail fail this function is not going to work
        #endif
        
int main(void) {
            void *a = (void*) &sigabbrev_np;
            long long b = (long long) a;
            return (int) b;
        }

-----------
Running compile:
Working directory:  /data/data/com.termux/files/home/hyprland-deps/libinput/build/meson-private/tmp5r272wo2
Code:
#define _GNU_SOURCE 1
#include <string.h>
        int main(void) {

        /* With some toolchains (MSYS2/mingw for example) the compiler
         * provides various builtins which are not really implemented and
         * fall back to the stdlib where they aren't provided and fail at
         * build/link time. In case the user provides a header, including
         * the header didn't lead to the function being defined, and the
         * function we are checking isn't a builtin itself we assume the
         * builtin is not functional and we just error out. */
        #if !0 && !defined(sigabbrev_np) && !0
            #error "No definition for __builtin_sigabbrev_np found in the prefix"
        #endif

        #ifdef __has_builtin
            #if !__has_builtin(__builtin_sigabbrev_np)
                #error "__builtin_sigabbrev_np not found"
            #endif
        #elif ! defined(sigabbrev_np)
            __builtin_sigabbrev_np;
        #endif
        return 0;
        }
-----------
